title: 马嵬坡
author: 郑畋
content:
玄宗回马杨妃死
云雨难忘日月新
终是圣明天子事
景阳宫井又何人
translation:
Xuanzong returned on horseback, Yang Guifei died
The old love was unforgettable, but the sun and moon renew
In the end, it was the act of a wise emperor
But what of the man in Jingyang's palace well?
annotation: Emperor Xuanzong had his beloved Yang Guifei killed to save his throne. Zheng Tian says it was 'wise' — but the sarcasm is sharp. How wise is it to kill the one you love?

title: 已凉
author: 韩偓
content:
碧阑干外绣帘垂
猩色屏风画折枝
八尺龙须方锦褥
已凉天气未寒时
translation:
Beyond the green railing, embroidered curtains hang
A vermillion screen painted with broken branches
Eight-foot dragon-beard mat, square brocade quilt
The weather is already cool but not yet cold
annotation: A room described in perfect detail — curtains, screen, mat, quilt. But the real subject is the feeling: that moment between cool and cold, between desire and restraint.

title: 春尽
author: 韩偓
content:
惜春连日醉昏昏
醒后衣裳见酒痕
细水浮花归别涧
断云含雨入孤村
人闲易有芳时恨
地迥难招自古魂
惭愧流莺相厚意
清晨犹为到西园
translation:
Cherishing spring, day after day drunk and dizzy
After waking, wine stains on my clothes
Tiny streams carry flowers to other ravines
Broken clouds hold rain entering a lonely village
When people are idle, it's easy to resent beautiful times
In remote places, it's hard to summon ancient souls
Grateful that the oriole is so kind
At dawn, it still comes to the western garden
annotation: Spring is ending, and he's been drinking to avoid feeling it. Flowers float away, clouds break apart. Only the oriole still visits. Han Wo's loneliness is almost physical.

title: 苏武庙
author: 温庭筠
content:
苏武魂销汉使前
古祠高树两茫然
雁断胡天月
羊归塞草烟
回日楼台非甲帐
去时冠剑是丁年
茂陵不见封侯印
空向秋波哭逝川
translation:
Su Wu's soul melted before the Han envoy
The ancient temple and tall trees, both lost in time
Geese cut off from the barbarian sky's moon
Sheep return to the frontier grass's smoke
When he returned, the towers were no longer his tent
When he left, he was a young man in his prime
At Maoling, no marquis seal was seen
In vain, facing autumn waves, he weeps for the passing river
annotation: Su Wu was held captive by the Xiongnu for 19 years. When he returned, everything had changed. Wen Tingyun asks: what's the point of loyalty when the world moves on without you?

title: 瑶瑟怨
author: 温庭筠
content:
冰簟银床梦不成
碧天如水夜云轻
雁声远过潇湘去
十二楼中月自明
translation:
On the silver bed with its ice mat, dreams won't come
Blue sky like water, night clouds light
The sound of geese passes far toward Xiao and Xiang
In the twelve towers, the moon shines by itself
annotation: She can't sleep. The sky is clear, geese fly south, the moon shines alone. Wen Tingyun paints loneliness with moonlight and distant bird calls.

title: 利州南渡
author: 温庭筠
content:
澹然空水对斜晖
曲岛苍茫接翠微
波上马嘶看棹去
柳边人歇待船归
数丛沙草群鸥散
万顷江田一鹭飞
谁解乘舟寻范蠡
五湖烟水独忘机
translation:
Calm, empty water faces the slanting sunlight
Winding islets, vast and hazy, meet the emerald haze
On the waves, a horse neighs, I watch the oar go
By the willows, people rest, waiting for the boat to return
Several clusters of sand grass, a flock of gulls scatters
Ten thousand acres of river fields, one egret flies
Who understands riding a boat to find Fan Li?
On the five lakes' misty water, alone forgetting all schemes
annotation: A river crossing at sunset. Gulls scatter, an egret flies. Wen Tingyun thinks of Fan Li, the wise man who left politics for a boat. 'Forgetting all schemes' — that's the dream.

title: 送人东游
author: 温庭筠
content:
荒戍落黄叶
浩然离故关
高风汉阳渡
初日郢门山
江上几人在
天涯孤棹还
何当重相见
樽酒慰离颜
translation:
Desolate fortress, yellow leaves fall
With resolve, he leaves the old pass
High wind at Hanyang crossing
First sun at Yingmen Mountain
How many remain by the river?
A lone oar returns from the edge of the sky
When will we meet again?
Wine to comfort our parting faces
annotation: Yellow leaves, high wind, a lone boat. Wen Tingyun sends a friend into the unknown. 'When will we meet again?' — the question that haunts every farewell.

title: 陇西行
author: 陈陶
content:
誓扫匈奴不顾身
五千貂锦丧胡尘
可怜无定河边骨
犹是春闺梦里人
translation:
Sworn to sweep away the Xiongnu, regardless of life
Five thousand sable and brocade, lost in barbarian dust
Pitiful — the bones by the Wuding River
Are still the person in a spring chamber's dream
annotation: Five thousand soldiers died. Their bones are by the river. But their wives still dream of them coming home. The most devastating war poem.

title: 将进酒
author: 李贺
content:
琉璃钟
琥珀浓
小槽酒滴真珠红
烹龙炮凤玉脂泣
罗帏绣幕围香风
吹龙笛
击鼍鼓
皓齿歌
细腰舞
况是青春日将暮
桃花乱落如红雨
劝君终日酩酊醉
酒不到刘伶坟上土
translation:
Crystal cup
Amber thick
From the small trough, wine drops like real pearls
Cooking phoenix, roasting dragon, jade fat weaves
Silk curtains and embroidered screens enclose fragrant wind
Blowing the dragon flute
Beating the alligator drum
White teeth singing
Slender waists dancing
Besides, youth's day is about to dusk
Peach blossoms fall chaotically like red rain
I urge you: be drunk all day
Wine won't reach Liu Ling's grave soil
annotation: Li He's wildest poem. Dragons, phoenixes, pearl wine, red rain of petals. 'Be drunk all day' — because death is the only sobering thing. Carpe diem with a gothic twist.

title: 李凭箜篌引
author: 李贺
content:
吴丝蜀桐张高秋
空山凝云颓不流
江娥啼竹素女愁
李凭中国弹箜篌
昆山玉碎凤凰叫
芙蓉泣露香兰笑
十二门前融冷光
二十三丝动紫皇
女娲炼石补天处
石破天惊逗秋雨
梦入神山教神妪
老鱼跳波瘦蛟舞
吴质不眠倚桂树
露脚斜飞湿寒兔
translation:
Wu silk, Shu paulownia, stretched in high autumn
Empty mountain, clouds congealed, not flowing
River goddess cries on bamboo, plain girl grieves
Li Ping in China plays the harp
Kunshan jade shatters, phoenix cries
Lotus weeps dew, orchid laughs
Before the twelve gates, cold light melts
Twenty-three strings move the purple emperor
Where Nüwa smelted stones to mend the sky
Stones break, sky startles, teasing autumn rain
In dreams, entering sacred mountains, teaching divine old women
Old fish leap in waves, thin dragons dance
Wu Zhi doesn't sleep, leaning on the cassia tree
Dew feet slant flying, wetting the cold rabbit
annotation: Li He's most fantastical poem. Music so powerful it breaks the sky, makes fish dance, keeps the moon god awake. This is what happens when a poet hears music and sees the universe.

title: 金铜仙人辞汉歌
titlePinyin: Jin Tong Xian Ren Ci Han Ge
titleEn: The Bronze Immortal's Farewell to Han
author: 李贺
content:
魏明帝诏牵车
指千里东关
酸风射眸子
忆君清泪如铅水
衰兰送客咸阳道
天若有情天亦老
携盘独出月荒凉
渭城已远波声小
translation:
Emperor Ming of Wei orders the cart pulled
Pointing a thousand miles to the eastern pass
Sour wind shoots into the eyes
Remembering you, clear tears like lead water
Wilted orchids see the guest off on the Xianyang road
If heaven had feelings, heaven would also grow old
Carrying the plate alone, the moon is desolate
Wei City is far now, the wave sounds small
annotation: A bronze statue is moved from its palace. It weeps lead tears. 'If heaven had feelings, heaven would grow old' — Li He's most famous line. Even the sky would age from grief.

title: 雁门太守行
titleEn: Song of the Governor of Yanmen
author: 李贺
content:
黑云压城城欲摧
甲光向日金鳞开
角声满天秋色里
塞上燕脂凝夜紫
半卷红旗临易水
霜重鼓寒声不起
报君黄金台上意
提携玉龙为君死
translation:
Black clouds press the city, the city about to crumble
Armor light faces the sun, golden scales open
Horn sounds fill the sky in autumn colors
On the frontier, rouge congeals into night's purple
Half-rolled red banner approaches the Yi River
Frost heavy, drum cold, the sound won't rise
To repay the Golden Tower's intention
I'll carry the jade sword and die for you
annotation: The most colorful war poem. Black clouds, golden armor, purple night, red banners. Li He paints battle like a fever dream. The final line: 'I'll die for you' — loyalty unto death.

title: 梦天
author: 李贺
content:
老兔寒蟾泣天色
云楼半开壁斜白
玉轮轧露湿团光
鸾珮相逢桂香陌
黄尘清水三山下
更变千年如走马
遥望齐州九点烟
一泓海水杯中泻
translation:
Old rabbit, cold toad, weeping the sky's color
Cloud towers half-open, walls slanting white
Jade wheel rolls over dew, wetting clustered light
Phoenix pendants meet on the cassia-scented path
Yellow dust and clear water beneath the three mountains
A thousand years change like a running horse
From afar, the nine states are nine dots of smoke
A cup of sea water poured from a cup
annotation: Li He dreams of heaven. The moon is a palace, the earth is nine dots of smoke, the ocean is a cup of water. From above, everything small becomes nothing. This is cosmic perspective.

title: 南园
author: 李贺
content:
男儿何不带吴钩
收取关山五十州
请君暂上凌烟阁
若个书生万户侯
translation:
Why doesn't a man carry a Wu hook
And reclaim the fifty provinces of passes and mountains?
I ask you: go briefly to the Lingyan Pavilion
How many scholars became marquises of ten thousand households?
annotation: Li He is frustrated. Why study when soldiers get all the glory? 'How many scholars became marquises?' — the question that every bookish person has asked.

title: 致酒行
author: 李贺
content:
零落栖迟一杯酒
主人奉觞客长寿
主父西游困不归
家人折断门前柳
吾闻马周昔作新丰客
天荒地老无人识
空将笺上两行书
直犯龙颜请恩泽
我有迷魂招不得
雄鸡一声天下白
少年心事当拏云
谁念幽寒坐呜呃
translation:
Wandering, stranded, one cup of wine
The host offers a cup, the guest wishes longevity
The master's son went west and was trapped, didn't return
His family broke the willows by the gate
I heard Ma Zhou was once a guest in Xinfeng
Heaven old, earth withered, no one knew him
With just two lines on paper
He directly approached the dragon face and asked for grace
I have a lost soul that can't be summoned
Until a rooster crows and the world turns white
A young man's heart should grasp the clouds
Who pities the cold, sitting and whimpering?
annotation: Li He is broke and forgotten. But then — a rooster crows, the world turns white. 'A young man's heart should grasp the clouds.' Even in despair, he won't stop reaching.

title: 宫词
author: 薛涛
content:
花开不同赏
花落不同悲
欲问相思处
花开花落时
translation:
When flowers bloom, we don't admire them together
When flowers fall, we don't grieve together
If you ask when I miss you
It's when flowers bloom and when they fall
annotation: A woman's longing in four lines. Every season reminds her of who's missing. Xue Tao was one of the most famous female poets of the Tang.

title: 送友人
author: 薛涛
content:
水国蒹葭夜有霜
月寒山色共苍苍
谁言千里自今夕
离梦杳如关塞长
translation:
Water country, reeds, night has frost
Moon cold, mountain colors, all blue-green
Who says a thousand miles starts tonight?
The parting dream is as long as the frontier passes
annotation: Frost, cold moon, blue mountains. The dream of parting stretches as far as the frontier. Xue Tao makes distance feel infinite.

title: 筹笔驿
author: 李商隐
content:
猿鸟犹疑畏简书
风云常为护储胥
徒令上将挥神笔
终见降王走传车
管乐有才真不忝
关张无命欲何如
他年锦里经祠庙
梁父吟成恨有余
translation:
Monkeys and birds still fear his written orders
Wind and clouds always protected his camp
In vain did the great general wield his divine brush
In the end, the conquered king rode the prison cart
Guan Zhong and Yue Yi had talent — truly not inferior
But Guan Yu and Zhang Fei had no fate — what could be done?
In later years, passing the temple in Jinli
The Liangfu Song finished, regret remains
annotation: Zhuge Liang was brilliant but couldn't save his kingdom. Li Shangyin asks: what good is talent without luck? 'Regret remains' — the word that defines Li Shangyin's poetry.

title: 马嵬
author: 李商隐
content:
海外徒闻更九州
他生未卜此生休
空闻虎旅传宵柝
无复鸡人报晓筹
此日六军同驻马
当时七夕笑牵牛
如何四纪为天子
不及卢家有莫愁
translation:
From beyond the sea, one hears of nine more continents
Next life is uncertain, this life is over
In vain, the tiger guard passes the night watch
No more the rooster man announces the dawn
Today, the six armies all halt their horses
That time, on Qixi, they laughed at the Cowherd
How can forty years as emperor
Be worse than the Lu family having a wife named Mo Chou?
annotation: Emperor Xuanzong had everything — empire, love, power. But he lost his wife and his throne. Li Shangyin's devastating question: how is being emperor worse than being a common man with a loving wife?

title: 隋宫
author: 李商隐
content:
乘兴南游不戒严
九重谁省谏书函
春风举国裁宫锦
半作障泥半作帆
translation:
In high spirits, he tours the south without caution
Who in the palace reads the warning letters?
In spring wind, the whole country cuts palace brocade
Half for mud guards, half for sails
annotation: The Sui emperor's extravagance: the whole country cuts silk just for his boats. Half for mud guards, half for sails. Luxury built on the people's exhaustion.

title: 二月二日
titleEn: The Second Day of the Second Month
author: 李商隐
content:
二月二日江上行
东风日暖闻吹笙
花须柳眼各无赖
紫蝶黄蜂俱有情
万里忆归元亮井
三年从事亚夫营
新滩莫悟游人意
更作风檐夜雨声
translation:
On the second day of the second month, I walk by the river
East wind, warm sun, I hear flute playing
Flowers' stamens and willow eyes — all unruly
Purple butterflies and yellow wasps — all full of feeling
Ten thousand miles, I remember returning to Yuan Liang's well
Three years, serving in Ya Fu's camp
The new shoal doesn't understand the traveler's heart
And makes the sound of wind and rain on the eaves at night
annotation: Spring is beautiful but he's far from home. The flowers don't care, the butterflies don't care. Only he feels the loneliness. Even the river sounds like rain on a lonely night.

title: 筹笔驿
author: 罗隐
content:
抛掷南阳为主忧
北征东讨尽良筹
时来天地皆同力
运去英雄不自由
千里山河轻孺子
两朝冠剑恨谯周
唯余岩下多情水
犹解年年傍驿流
translation:
He left Nanyang, worrying for his lord
Northern campaigns, eastern attacks — all good strategy
When fortune comes, heaven and earth join forces
When luck leaves, even heroes aren't free
A thousand miles of rivers and mountains, light for the child
Two dynasties' robes and swords, hate for Qiao Zhou
Only the多情 water beneath the rocks
Still understands, flowing by the station year after year
annotation: Zhuge Liang did everything right but still failed. Luo Yin's verdict: 'When luck leaves, even heroes aren't free.' Sometimes it's not about talent — it's about timing.

title: 蜂
author: 罗隐
content:
不论平地与山尖
无限风光尽被占
采得百花成蜜后
为谁辛苦为谁甜
translation:
Whether flat land or mountain peak
All the beautiful scenery is occupied
After gathering a hundred flowers to make honey
For whom is the toil? For whom is the sweetness?
annotation: Bees work for others. Luo Yin asks: who benefits from your labor? This is a poem about workers, about artists, about anyone who creates for someone else's enjoyment.

title: 雪
author: 罗隐
content:
尽道丰年瑞
丰年事若何
长安有贫者
为瑞不宜多
translation:
Everyone says snow is a good omen for a bumper year
But what about a bumper year's reality?
In Chang'an there are poor people
For them, too much 'good omen' is not good
annotation: Snow is beautiful — if you're warm. Luo Yin reminds us: the poor freeze while the rich admire the 'good omen.' His most direct social criticism.

title: 自遣
author: 罗隐
content:
得即高歌失即休
多愁多恨亦悠悠
今朝有酒今朝醉
明日愁来明日愁
translation:
When you win, sing loudly; when you lose, let it go
Too much sorrow and hate — also fleeting
Today there's wine, today get drunk
Tomorrow's worries — worry about them tomorrow
annotation: Failed the exam ten times. Luo Yin's response: 'Today there's wine, today get drunk.' It's not giving up — it's surviving. Sometimes the bravest thing is to laugh.
